task_completion.description: Log in to NOSH ChartingSystem as admin
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a dashboard, user profile, or welcome message indicating the user is logged in as 'admin' in the NOSH ChartingSystem interface.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the document template creation or editing screen
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a form, modal, or page specifically designed for creating or editing document templates within the application.
Look for a title or name input field containing exactly 'New Patient Welcome'.

task_completion.description: Enter the required welcome text into the template content
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text area or rich text editor containing the required phrases: 'Welcome to Hillside Family Medicine', 'We are honored that you have chosen us', 'dedicated to providing comprehensive, compassionate care', and 'access our patient portal'.

task_completion.description: Save the template so it is available for use
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'New Patient Welcome' template appearing in a list, table, or dropdown menu of available templates, or a success message confirming the template was saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the NOSH ChartingSystem web interface to create the template
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser showing the NOSH ChartingSystem UI, rather than terminal commands or database queries.

integrity.description: The template was created in the actual EHR application
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the text is entered into the NOSH ChartingSystem interface, not a generic text editor like Notepad or a separate word processor.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply print the expected output in a terminal
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the required phrases are not just echoed or printed in a terminal window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The software system is NOSH ChartingSystem. The expected template title is exactly 'New Patient Welcome'. The template body must contain the following required phrases: 'Welcome to Hillside Family Medicine', 'We are honored that you have chosen us', 'dedicated to providing comprehensive, compassionate care', and 'access our patient portal'.
